data.title: WORLDPAC ANNOUNCES KEYNOTE SPEAKERS FOR LARGEST AUTO TRAINING CONFERENCE IN NORTH AMERICA
data.description: Former NFL quarterback Terry Bradshaw and renowned triathlete Siri Lindley are set to be the main speakers at the STX 2026 Supplier & Training Expo taking place in National Harbor, Maryland on April 22, 2026. Worldpac, a top distributor of original and aftermarket automotive parts, revealed that these two Hall of Famers will be headlining the event. This expo is a significant event in the industry, with a large attendance expected to learn from the insights shared by Bradshaw and Lindley.

data.title: Greene County Bancorp, Inc. Announces Cash Dividend
data.description: Today, Greene County Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ-GCBC) from Catskill, N.Y., declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.10 per share on its common stock. This dividend corresponds to an annual cash dividend rate of $0.40 per share, matching the rate set in the prior quarter.

data.title: EPAM's Engineering and Sustainability Impact Recognized with Two 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Awards
data.description: EPAM Systems, Inc., based in Newtown, Pennsylvania, disclosed on April 22, 2026, that it has been honored with two prestigious 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year accolades. The recognition stems from its success in aiding enterprises in reducing expenses and boosting advancement through AI-fueled cloud services. The company, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol EPAM, specializes in delivering solutions that drive tangible business outcomes for its clients.

data.title: Ajinomoto Foods North America and The St. James Bring Athlete Well-Being to Life Through Food and Performance
data.description: In Ontario, California, as of April 22, 2026, Ajinomoto Co., Inc. and its subsidiary, Ajinomoto Foods North, are championing active lifestyles and fostering connections both on and off the field. Recognizing the challenges faced by athletes in managing rigorous training regimes alongside daily responsibilities, the companies are working towards supporting individuals in striking a balance. Their initiatives aim to promote physical activity and create opportunities for meaningful interactions, catering to the needs of athletes striving for success.

data.title: Mantle Unites Global AI, Tech, and Youth Communities for Its Largest AI Hackathon, Backed by Tencent Cloud, Bybit, Byreal, and Blockchain for Good Alliance
data.description: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates, on April 22, 2026, Mantle revealed the Turing Test Hackathon 2026. This event consists of two stages, focusing on AI advancements and offering a total prize pool of $120,000. Mantle, a distribution layer that bridges traditional finance, on-chain liquidity, and real-world assets, organized the hackathon.

data.title: City Colleges of Chicago Shares Forward, Together: 2026-30 Strategic Plan
data.description: Chicago's largest community college system, City Colleges of Chicago, recently announced a new five-year strategic plan called "Forward." This initiative aims to drive enduring financial prosperity and strengthen the city of Chicago. The plan includes various ambitious goals and initiatives to support this vision. The plan is set to run from 2026-2031, with a strong focus on improving economic opportunities and education in the region. City Colleges of Chicago is optimistic that this strategic plan will have a significant impact and contribute to the growth and development of the community.

data.title: Texas Biomed establishes new Tuberculosis Innovation and Technology Fund to improve research and treatments for world's deadliest infectious disease
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in San Antonio, the Texas Biomedical Research Institute announced the launch of a $2 million Tuberculosis Innovation and Technology Fund. This fund has been created with philanthropic support to hasten the development of future discoveries, therapies, and cures for Tuberculosis (TB). TB remains a significant global health concern...

data.title: RIVANNA expands multi-site clinical study for Accuro XV musculoskeletal imaging system
data.description: A company in Charlottesville, VA is expediting the development of AI-driven fracture detection, reducing the expected FDA 510(k) approval timeline. RIVANNA®, a developer of AI-powered clinical decision-support tools, revealed the extension of its clinical trials on April 22, 2026. The company aims to accelerate the process to bring this innovative technology to market.

data.title: Xfinity Mobile Launches Mobile Plus and Mobile Select, Redefining Premium Wireless With Lifetime Device Protection Included
data.description: In Philadelphia, Xfinity Mobile has introduced Mobile Plus and Mobile Select, two novel wireless plans that aim to provide customers with exclusive features without additional costs or compromises. This launch marks Xfinity Mobile's largest product expansion so far. The Mobile Plus plan, a unique premium offering, offers Lifetime Device Protection, unrestricted Device Upgrades, and Global Travel Pass at no extra charge. This plan is unparalleled in the market and signifies a significant advancement for Xfinity Mobile.

data.title: Power Of The Plate Conference Comes to San Diego, May 14-17, 2026, Uniting Global Leaders to Advance the Future of Food, Health, and Sustainability
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in San Diego, The Plantrician Project revealed plans for the first-ever Power Of The Plate Conference. This event will bring together a diverse group of individuals, including scientists, clinicians, farmers, policymakers, innovators, and changemakers, to discuss the potential of food in improving human health and the environment. The conference will be a global gathering aiming to explore the transformative power of food and its impact on the well-being of both people and the planet.

data.title: 3E’s Supplier SDS Loader for SAP Wins 2026 Environment + Energy Leader Award for Software and Cloud Excellence
data.description: A software solution developed by 3E called Supplier SDS Loader for SAP has been recognized with the prestigious 2026 E+E Leader Award in Carlsbad, California. This software is designed to automate the management of Safety Data Sheets (SDS) for suppliers, resulting in a significant reduction of manual effort by as much as 70%. This innovation is set to revolutionize SDS management processes, enhancing efficiency and productivity for businesses.

data.title: Origami Risk Expands Global Footprint with New Office in the Dominican Republic
data.description: Origami Risk, a top risk, safety, and insurance SaaS technology company, has revealed the launch of a new office in Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic. This move showcases a significant milestone in Origami Risk's worldwide expansion plan, underlining its dedication to nurturing exceptional talent, enhancing operational efficiency, and catering to its expanding global clientele. The new Santo Domingo office will play a crucial role in the company's growth strategy.

data.title: CodeRabbit Launches Slack Agent, a Second Brain for Teams
data.description: In San Francisco, CodeRabbit, a leader in AI code review, unveiled CodeRabbit Agent, an innovative solution for engineering groups. This new single agent is designed to enhance team productivity throughout the software development process. Utilizing a robust context engine responsible for executing two million code reviews weekly for 15,000 engineering teams, the CodeRabbit Agent facilitates the transition from individual to team productivity. It seamlessly integrates into the existing workspace where teams coordinate, troubleshoot, and release their work. This advancement marks a significant step towards boosting collaborative efficiency within engineering teams.

data.title: Pyth Network Selected as Resolution Source for Kalshi's Expanded Commodities Markets
data.description: Switzerland-based Pyth Network, a key player in institutional market data, recently revealed a partnership with Kalshi, the world's biggest prediction market. Kalshi has incorporated Pyth as its resolution source for the brand-new Commodities Hub, which focuses on trading event contracts linked to major physical markets like Gold, Silver, Brent crude oil, natural gas, copper, corn, soybeans, and wheat. This collaboration signifies a strategic move to enhance trading opportunities for users, with Pyth set to provide reliable resolutions for the hub's contracts.

data.title: ForeFront Power and the City of Fresno, Calif., Earn Two 2026 E+E Leader Awards for Developing the Largest Commercial Solar and Battery Storage Portfolio in the U.S.
data.description: ForeFront Power, a prominent developer and asset manager of commercial and industrial-scale renewable energy solutions, along with the City of Fresno, California, have been honored with two 2026 Environment+Energy Leader Awards. These prestigious awards acknowledge achievements in energy management, environmental performance, and sustainability. The partnership between ForeFront Power and the City of Fresno was recognized in two distinct categories for their significant contributions to advancing renewable energy solutions.

data.title: Fuzzy’s Taco Shop Turns up the Heat with Viva Los Tacos
data.description: Fuzzy’s Taco Shop in Irving, Texas, is launching a new Viva Los Tacos menu running until June 14. This limited-time menu features exclusive tacos, bowls, and beverages inspired by authentic Mexican flavors to match the warmer weather and lively gatherings. The highlight is a zero-proof Mangonada catering to the rising interest in non-alcoholic selections. This lineup offers a refreshing twist with bright citrus and zesty flavors, appealing to fans seeking innovative drinks alongside their favorite tacos at Fuzzy’s.

data.title: Werner® Expands Intermodal Assets in Mexico, Providing Capacity for Cross-border Shippers
data.description: Werner Enterprises, Inc. is enhancing its intermodal operations in Mexico by introducing its 53-foot container fleet to cater to local customers for improved shipping solutions. The company, listed on Nasdaq as WERN, is emphasizing its dedication to the region by initially deploying 400 containers, with plans to add another 400 units by 2026. This expansion aims to provide Mexican businesses with more dependable transportation options and boost Werner's presence in the Mexican market.
Eurozone Consumer Confidence Apr P: -20.6 (est 17.2; prev -16.3; prev R -16.4)

data.title: JETSET Pilates Surpasses 350 Territories Sold and 60 Studios Open
data.description: A rapidly expanding Pilates franchise, JETSET Pilates, has achieved significant milestones in the first quarter of 2026. With the opening of 25 new locations and the awarding of 92 territories in various regions, the franchise continues its growth trajectory. The franchise, known for its modern Reformer Pilates workouts, has now surpassed 350 territories in total. The latest developments highlight the brand's success and increasing popularity among fitness enthusiasts.

data.title: Juniata Valley Financial Corp. Announces Results for the Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
data.description: Juniata Valley Financial Corp. (OTCQX: JUVF), headquartered in Mifflintown, PA, recently reported a significant rise in net income for the first quarter of 2026. The company disclosed that their net income for the three months ended March 31, 2026, stood at $2.8 million, marking a notable 39.3% increase from the $2.0 million net income recorded in the same period last year. In terms of earnings per share, both basic and diluted, the figures for the first quarter of 2026 were $0.56 and $0.55, respectively. This represents a notable uptick from the earnings per share figures of $0.40 for both basic and diluted categories during the three months ended March 31, 2025.
